title: rubus × variegatus
intro: Rubus × variegatus, also known as the variegated raspberry, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Rubus idaeus (European red raspberry) and Rubus occidentalis (American black raspberry). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × variegatus include its ability to aid in digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from minor skin irritations. Rubus × variegatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the affected area.
